reviews.review_description: The game is fun and everything is driving is good it I just have a hard time trying to find the bombs in time and try to figure out how to get back to the station that's very confusing when you got a certain time limit to get back and drop the bomb off and go back out find another one and leave the confusion of thinking where you about to go need some kind of map or some kind of arrow showing which way to go and which way to go back it's very confusing some kind of airplane where to find a bomb at cuz I'll be trying to look for the bomb and I can't even find it but but it's already too late a blow up then try to get the bomb until I get back to wherever I left from from the station and can't find it and it blowing up it makes it very difficult and tedious to play your point just don't play it no more it's fun driving around and everything but it gets confusing

Played it for a few hours so far and it's been a heap of fun. Once I got used to the controls and how to find the bomb, it's heart pounding stress to get it back to base lol, my husband asked what I was screaming about 🤣 , but it makes it a good challenge. Had a few suggestions for the Dev and they are incredibly responsive and have even put out updates based on my feedback already.

developer_response.body: Hi Nevinsim, your suggestions were brilliant and guess what!?!? More of those ideas have just been released in the latest version which you can access right now! We're glad we could make you scream. Tell your neighbors not to call the police if they hear more screaming.... and don't play this game on a plane or in an airport. Just...don't.

reviews.review_description: It's fun to figure out games like this that don't point out every control and how to do things it adds that mysterious effect to it making it challenging and exciting also the voice lines from the person in the car is hilarious can't wait for future updates

developer_response.body: Ha yes, can't make it too easy but also don't want any frustration. Just to be sure that frustration isn't a thing, I'll be making controls more obvious. I've just added thumbstick steering as an option and with all of the feedback I'm getting, I can see numerous updates happening this week. So glad you enjoyed the game and gave me a kind 4 stars. Really appreciate it!

reviews.review_description: I've spent about an hour so far with this game and I am very impressed, visually it looks amazing and shows what the quest is capable of, the driving takes some getting used to but when you get it, it feels great! Drifting and shooting at the same time never gets old. My only complaint is that I would find the bomb and only have about 10 seconds to return to the car and drop it off, without any indication where to go apart from "return to base" I'm sure eventually I would find where the bass is bit I can see this being difficult for some people (myself included) there is an option for free ride and I spent a lot of time driving around and shooting other cars. Don't sleep on this one as it has great great potential! Also the developer is very active and the customer service is nothing short of amazing.
